top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(*) - COUNT(CASE WHEN r.grid = 1 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_not_first_track
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' 
  AND d.surname = 'Hamilton'
  AND ra.year >= 2010;

WITH hamilton_races AS (
    SELECT r.raceId, r.year, r.circuitId, res.grid
    FROM races r
    JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
    JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
    WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton' AND r.year >= 2010
),
first_track_races AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT circuitId, name
    FROM circuits
    WHERE circuitId = 1  -- Assuming circuitId = 1 is the first track (e.g., Silverstone or similar)
),
hamilton_first_track_starts AS (

    FROM races r

    JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(*) - COUNT(CASE WHEN r.grid = 1 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_not_first_track
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' 
  AND d.surname = 'Hamilton'
  AND ra.year >= 2010;
